title: Why don't HK officials talk about the riot in America?

replies.msg: They don't wanna miss any chance to mock America. Right? Because it involves police brutality and they are aware of the comparison?
HK chief executive officer : we don,t wanna see any violence between protest but i think US Gov take an action to calm the folks immediatealy.

I saw on many police brutality in USA forums and photo sites.
Many many.
This must be why HK police do not want to mention about it.
